lesson.menu_desc: Introductions and the Present Continuous for Projects -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 4 -- Meeting the Team -- Introductions and the Present Continuous
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Walyson Ginaldo Silva | Aula 4 -- Meeting the Team

listenings.text: Hi, this is Walyson. Let me introduce you to my team here in Santos. We are a small group, but right now everyone is very busy. First, there is Bruno. He is my supervisor, and he is in charge of the whole logistics department. This week he is leading the shipping plan for the European market. Next to him sits Camila. She is my teammate in quality control, and at the moment she is handling the samples from three new origins. In the office next door, Rafael is working with the finance team. He is preparing the quarterly report, and he is also setting up the meetings with the buyers. Finally, we are all working together on one big project: we are launching a new traceability platform for our clients. It is a busy month, but I really enjoy my team.

Hi Walyson, this is Marina, your counterpart at the Geneva office. I am calling to introduce myself before our first meeting. My role here is the same as yours: I am in charge of quality and traceability for the European market. Right now my team is very active. Two analysts are reviewing the new contracts, and our junior buyer is reaching out to roasters in Germany and Italy. This week I am also leading a small project on sustainability reports. I would love to set up a video call next Tuesday so we can compare our systems. Please reach out to me if Tuesday does not work for you. I am really looking forward to working with your team. Talk soon.

extra_audio.text: First, the manager opens the meeting and introduces the visitor to the team. Next, each colleague says their role and which department they work in. Then they explain what they are working on this week. After that, they set up the next call and assign the new tasks. Finally, the manager thanks everyone and closes the meeting.
